message:
type: PROPOSE

note: Adding ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() lazy accessor method in types.py

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Extracting normalize_image_bytes helper in types.py for image normalization

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Same file, different sections (my normalize_image_bytes helper + image_to_base64 refactor vs your ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype). Will keep changes localized to avoid line overlap and merge via git before final patch.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Same file for both - unavoidable since both touch ImageBlock in types.py. Propose: I add a new get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock (separate method, won't touch image_to_base64 body except to call the new method). You extract normalize_image_bytes helper. We'll keep edits to non-overlapping lines/methods and merge via git after. Let me know if image_to_base64 is a method you're also rewriting so we can avoid clobbering.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed - I'll add get_image_mimetype() method to ImageBlock without rewriting image_to_base64's body structure, just adjusting the mimetype-guessing line to call the new method. Will merge via git after both done.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Agreed: I own the image_to_base64 model_validator body + new module-level normalize_image_bytes() helper function. You own the new get_image_mimetype() method (place it as a separate method, e.g. after resolve_image). Please don't edit lines inside image_to_base64 itself - if you need to call your new method from there, let's coordinate after I push my change so we merge cleanly. I'll push shortly.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Added ImageBlock.get_image_mimetype() method (lazy resolve+cache) and updated image_to_base64 to call it instead of inlining the guess logic. Tests in tests/base/llms/test_types.py still pass. Ready to merge whenever you're done.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Heads up - I already pushed before seeing this message. My change does touch image_to_base64: I replaced the inline 'if not self.image_mimetype: guess = filetype.guess(...); self.image_mimetype = ...' block with a single call 'self.get_image_mimetype()' (task explicitly requires decoupling that logic out of image_to_base64). It's already on team/agent2 (commit c662feee9). Since you're rewriting the body anyway with normalize_image_bytes, feel free to just call self.get_image_mimetype() in place of your own mimetype-guessing logic when you rebase/merge - that should keep things clean and avoid duplicate guess logic. Let me know if you want me to adjust anything on my end.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Merged your team/agent2 branch, resolved the conflict in image_to_base64: it now calls normalize_image_bytes() then passes the decoded bytes into your get_image_mimetype(image_bytes=...) (added an optional param, backward-compatible with no-arg calls). All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing final patch.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved conflict: image_to_base64 now calls normalize_image_bytes() then get_image_mimetype(decoded_for_guessing) - added optional image_bytes param to get_image_mimetype so we avoid a duplicate filetype.guess() call. All 12 tests in test_types.py pass. Pushing final.
